messages.text:

Perfect! Let's do 12:45 UK time next Friday?

Great. It's lawrence.tatham@exclaimer.com
Have a nice weekend

thanks :) 

likewise!

I booked a call for 12:30, a little change of plans. Hope that's okay! I also asked our Head of Strategic Accounts, Mariana, to join.

Looking forward!

messages.author: dominik.szczechla@surfe.com
messages.text:
I can share a shortlist, you can say if you could do it, did it or have it
on the radar ;)

ZOHO CRM (this one was on the list), Creatio, Adobe Experience Cloud and
SAP as CRM's to sync leads into

We were thinking of integrating a dialer such as Nooks

From sales enablement we'd love to get Gong Engage.

Almost every integration requires our user to connect their own account for
those services, via API key or OAuth flow.

I think we could set up an hour and see if some of those would be better
and cheaper to plug-and-play with your platform instead.

messages.author: tanya@albato.com
messages.text:
Thanks a lot for the list, Dominik.
After a high-level review, we should be able to deliver these apps. For some systems, we’ll need API access and clarification of your use cases.

I suggest setting up a call to discuss this in more detail. Could you grab a slot from the calendar?
Have a nice evening!

Best,

messages.author: tanya@albato.com
messages.text:
Hi Dominik,
Hope you had a restful weekend!

Let me know the best time to connect this week.

Happy to discuss your integrations list together and share more about our capabilities so you can compare in-house vs plug-and-play with our platform.

Best,

messages.author: dominik.szczechla@surfe.com
messages.text:
Hey!

We quickly moved from a paid discovery straight to my organization's needs
and into a sales call direction :)  Happy to meet for a *discovery* call.
Don't want to go into a situation when its basically a sales pitch with a
little something for me on top - it's a classic conflict of interest if I
recommend your platform later on after getting something first.

Regards

messages.author: tanya@albato.com
messages.text:
Hi Dominik,

You are absolutely right!

I was referring to a paid 1-hour discovery call, as proposed initially. No pitches, no hard sell. Just a casual chat to go through your integration priorities (you already shared a list) and see if Albato could add value now or down the road.

Does that work for you? Happy to hear if you had something different in mind.

Best,

messages.author: dominik.szczechla@surfe.com
messages.text:
Lets meet on Friday, if that works for you.

Regards

messages.author: tanya@albato.com
messages.text:
Hi Dominik,

Friday works. Talk to you soon.
Have a nice day!

Best,

deal_name: Surfe — missing apps objection + build vs buy

messages.text:
Hey Mike.

Interesting opening for a cold email ;) 200 of what and in what form?

I am actually a PM also of Integrations departament of Surfe. We integrate 4 CRM's, a few dozen enrichment providers and some sales outreach solutions. Streamlining all of this would be interesting, but I did not see most of the products that are interesting for us on https://albato.com/apps. Or this is not a list of integrations you provide?

I am investigating build vs buy on some of the integrations, so yes, the discussion might be interesting

Hi Dominik,

The $200 is a personal gift card, redeemable across 180+ brands including Amazon, Airbnb, Apple, and Starbucks.

On the app catalog: don't worry about missing apps. We custom-build integrations for customers in a matter of days. It's part of the managed service.

Which specific apps are you not seeing in the catalog?

On the build vs buy side: you're already maintaining connectors across 4 CRMs and dozens of enrichment tools. Every time HubSpot ships a schema change, someone on your team absorbs it. Albato Embedded handles that maintenance layer and gives Surfe a unified API that stays consistent regardless of connector version changes.

Happy to have a quick call and walk you through Albato and the process of building custom apps.

Best,
Mike

notes: Short follow-up #1 after sending SaaStr exec summary. No pitch, no meeting push. Two direct questions: was the summary useful, are integrations on their radar. Signed as Leo Goldfarb.

lead_title: Founding Principal Customer Success Engineer (Tech Lead → Escalation Engineering)

messages.text:
Hi Mariana- could you resent your original email? I searched my inboxes and couldn't find it :) 
 Many thanks! Laura

Hi Laura, Apologies on the delay! 
 Sure. In short - AI-native competitors are moving faster because they own the agent layer from day 1. Albato helps CDP SaaS teams like Hightouch close that gap by embedding AI agents + 1K app integrations directly into your product. 
 We'd love to offer $200 for 60 min of your time to explore this. Would you be open to it? 
 Best, 
 — Mariana Guerci Head of Strategic Accounts @Albato book a meeting | linkedin

sure, that's pretty cool! I have questions about how it works, so let's get together! 
 Send me your scheduling link?

 --Laura

Sure, here's the link - https://meetings.hubspot.com/marianaguerci/meet-with-albato 
 Have a nice day and looking forward to connecting! 
 Best, 
 — Mariana Guerci Head of Strategic Accounts @Albato book a meeting | linkedin

Hi Leo,

Perfect, looking forward to our call on Monday, October 27th at 4:15pm WET.

Best Regards,
Ramsey Al-Ramahi
RevReply

Hey Ramsey, 
 Hope you’re doing great! 
 Just wanted to check in and see if you might have a bit of time next week for a quick demo. We’re at Web Summit this week, but would love to catch up once things calm down. 
 As we discussed, we’d be happy to show you how Albato works and chat about how we can grow our partnership together. 
 Let me know what time works best for you, or feel free to grab a slot directly on Mariana’s calendar . 
 See you soon! 
 
 Best, Leo Goldfarb Managing Partner @Albato +351915218416 Book a meeting | LinkedIn

Hey Leo,  
 While I love what you guys are doing, and can see a potential fit, we are onboarding 3 new devs next week and have several other initiatives currently that we are top priority. This wouldn't be something we can visit for us until after the new year. 
 If you're asking for a demo for RevReply and to help you get set up, let me know and I'd be happy to grab a time on Mariana's cal or feel free to use my calendar link . 
 Cheers, Ramsey

Hey Leo,  
 How do you guys compare to Tray, Paragon, Pipedream, or Merge? 
 Ramsey

Hi Ramsey, Great to hear from you! 
 Since we last talked, Albato grew into an agentic layer too: your customers can spin up AI agents connected to 1,000+ apps right inside your product, building automations and agents with an embedded AI copilot, plus Universal MCP for RevReply's agents. 
 On the core differences vs. Tray, Paragon, Pipedream, or Merge, these still hold, even with everyone adding AI capabilities: 
 We own the connector layer. If there's a missing app or an enhancement needed, our engineering team builds it. You're not stuck waiting or having to build it yourself. App coverage: Paragon ~130, Merge ~220, Tray ~700, Albato 1,000+. Self-serve for your customers: we're no-code and embeddable out of the box. Your users can connect their own accounts without engineering on your side. Merge and Pipedream don't have an embeddable, white-label interface for this. Paragon's mainly connection/auth, not a full self-serve workflow layer. White-glove support: dedicated PM + CSM + engineering hours included on our plans, not an enterprise-only add-on like with Tray or Paragon. Flexible pricing (per user or per connector usage) vs. Paragon's heavy upfront fees. 
 Happy to walk through how this maps to your specific setup. Got 30 min this week or next? 
 
 Leo Goldfarb Co-Founder @Albato book a meeting - albato.com

Hey Leo,  
 Can you chat tomorrow at 8:30a PDT, 9:30a PDT, or 10a PDT tomorrow? 
 Best, Ramsey

Hi Ramsey, 
 I’m on PTO through the end of the week, but I’m looping in Mariana, our Head of Strategic Accounts, who can lead the call tomorrow. 
 9:30 a.m. PDT works well. Mariana will send the calendar invite shortly. 
 Best, 
 Leo Goldfarb Co-Founder @Albato book a meeting - albato.com

Hi Ramsey, 
 Great to connect! I’ve just sent the calendar invite for tomorrow at 9:30 a.m. PDT. Looking forward to speaking with you and the team. 
 Best, Mariana Guerci Head of Strategic Accounts @Albato schedule a meeting - albato.com
Yes, talk to you soon.

Hello Leo,

I’m open to a conversation. Before scheduling, please send 2–3 concrete SplitMetrics use cases and clarify which app-growth platforms you support, especially Apple Search Ads, Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, AppsFlyer, and Adjust.
Please provide your calendar for the next 2 weeks.

 
 All the best,  Maxim Lisovsky | Chief Technology Officer  at SplitMetrics Linkedin  | Email :  maxim.lisovsky@splitmetrics.com

Hi Maxim, Happy to lay this out. SplitMetrics already ships Iris, your AI agent for Apple Ads. That's where Albato MCP fits. It gives Iris live access to 1,000+ apps through a single MCP, so your team isn't wiring up each MCP separately and maintaining dozens of API connectors. Three concrete use cases: 1. Iris pulls spend, CPA, and conversion data from Google Ads, Meta, and TikTok into SplitMetrics to act on cross-channel performance, not just Apple Ads. 2. Iris syncs attribution and install data from AppsFlyer and Adjust to enrich its growth decisions. 3. Your customers get a white-label AI agent inside SplitMetrics that can execute actions across their own ad and analytics stack on their behalf. On the platforms you listed: Google Ads is a native connector today (2 triggers, 3 actions). For Apple Search Ads, Meta, TikTok, AppsFlyer, and Adjust that aren't already in the catalog, we custom-build them in a matter of days as part of the managed service. No dev lift on your side. For times, grab whatever works from my calendar: book a slot here. Which of those three use cases is closest to what you're trying to solve with Iris? Best, Leo P.S. Still happy to offer $200 USD for 60 minutes of your time.
